gateway-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.general_idea: Exclude SecurityAutoConfiguration to prevent Spring Security from being auto-configured in the gateway service.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Restrict Feign client scanning to a specific package to improve startup performance and avoid scanning unnecessary packages.
Replace direct Feign client injection with a service interface to decouple the controller from the client implementation.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Changed field from 'ProductClient productClient' to 'IProductService productService'.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Update the method call to match the new service interface contract.
Remove imports for classes that are no longer used in the controller after refactoring.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProductClient, OrderRepository, ObjectMapper, Logger, LoggerFactory, and unused annotations.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Remove fields that are no longer needed after the refactoring.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed LOGGER, mapper, and repository fields.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Introduce Lombok library to reduce boilerplate code in the project.
Replace manual getter and setter methods with the @Data annotation to leverage Lombok's code generation.

Replace manual getter and setter methods with the @Data annotation to reduce code verbosity.

product-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions on Java 17.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.7.17 to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime on Java 17.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.2 to 2023.0.3 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.
Add an empty URL tag to the POM metadata, likely to satisfy stricter validation or documentation standards.
